landing.seoDescription: Create stunning wedding invitations with AI-powered design. Send via link, email, or print. Track RSVPs in real-time.
landing.heroSubtitle: Design stunning, personalized invitations in minutes. Share them anywhere, track RSVPs in real time.
landing.featureAiDescription: AI recommends the perfect template for your style, making it effortless to find a design you love.
landing.featureSendDescription: Share your invitation via link, email, or printable PDF. Reach every guest the way that works best.
landing.featureRsvpDescription: Know who's coming with real-time RSVP tracking. No more guessing or follow-up calls.
landing.step1Description: Tell us about your wedding theme and preferences.
landing.step2Description: Personalize every detail — colors, fonts, wording, and layout.
landing.step3Description: Send your invitation by link, email, or download a PDF.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Start free with our Basic plan. Upgrade anytime for more features, higher guest limits, and premium templates.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to create your perfect invitation?
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of couples who chose Eloria for their special day.

pricing.seoDescription: Simple per-event pricing for your wedding invitations. Choose from Basic or Premium plans.
pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your wedding. Start free and upgrade anytime.
pricing.audiencePlanners: For wedding planners with multiple events

auth.emailVerifiedMessage: Your email has been verified successfully.
auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
auth.resetLinkSent: If your email is registered, you will receive a password reset link.
auth.passwordResetSuccess: Your password has been reset successfully!
auth.invalidResetLink: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noEvents: You haven't created any events yet.

eventDetail.dangerZoneDescription: Permanently delete this event and all its guest data. This action cannot be undone.
eventDetail.eventLockedDescription: Your subscription has expired. Reactivate your Pro subscription to restore access to this event.

guests.csvHelp: Paste CSV data below. Each line: {format1} or just {format2}
guests.noGuestsHelp: Add guests individually or import from CSV.
guests.guestLimitReached: Guest limit reached for your plan ({limit}). Upgrade to add more.
guests.importLimitExceeded: Import would exceed your guest limit ({limit}). You can add {remaining} more.

eventForm.title: Event Details
eventForm.additionalDetailsPlaceholder: Any additional information for your guests...

customImage.cardSubtitle: Already have a design? Use it.
customImage.uploadHint: Recommended: portrait, ~1080×1500. JPG, PNG, or WebP, max 10 MB.
customImage.dropzoneLabel: Drag your image here or click to browse
customImage.errorTooLarge: Image must be 10 MB or smaller.
customImage.errorWrongType: Only JPEG, PNG, and WebP images are allowed.
customImage.errorHeic: HEIC is not supported. Please save as JPEG.
customImage.errorGeneric: Could not upload image. Please try again.

templateSelection.title: Choose a Template
templateSelection.subtitle: Select a design for your wedding invitation
templateSelection.stylePlaceholder: Describe your wedding style (e.g., rustic barn wedding, autumn colors)
templateSelection.noTemplates: No templates available yet. Seed the database to add templates.

customization.title: Customize Your Invitation
customization.subtitle: Personalize the wording and style
customization.wordingPlaceholder: Write your invitation text or use AI to generate it...
customization.selectTemplateForPreview: Select a template to see the preview

preview.title: Preview Your Invitation
preview.subtitle: Review how your invitation will look to guests

payment.title: Choose Your Plan
payment.subtitle: Select a tier and publish your invitation
payment.proUpsellDescription: Instead of paying per event, subscribe to Pro for unlimited events, all features, and more.
payment.orChooseSingleEvent: Or pay for this event only

rsvp.title: RSVP
rsvp.usePersonalLink: Please use the personal link sent to you to RSVP.
rsvp.cantWait: We can't wait to celebrate with you!
rsvp.sorryMissYou: We're sorry you can't make it.
rsvp.hopeToSee: We hope to see you there!
rsvp.dearGuest: Dear {name}, please let us know if you'll be joining us.
rsvp.plusOne: I'll be bringing a plus one

templates.seoDescription: Browse our collection of beautiful wedding invitation templates. Rustic, modern, elegant, and more.
templates.title: Invitation Templates
templates.subtitle: Browse our collection of professionally designed wedding invitation templates. Find the perfect match for your style.
templates.comingSoonDescription: We're designing beautiful invitations for you. Check back soon.
templates.weLookForward: We look forward to celebrating with you
templates.honourOfYourPresence: The honour of your presence is requested
templates.joyfullyRequest: We joyfully request the honour of your presence

rustic-autumn.footerLine: We joyfully request the honour of your presence

modern-minimal.footerLine: We look forward to celebrating with you

classic-elegant.footerLine: The honour of your presence is requested

email.verifyBody:
Hi {name},

Please verify your email address by clicking the button below.
email.invitationBody:
Dear {guestName},

{couple1} & {couple2} would love for you to celebrate their wedding on {date}.
email.resetBody:
Hi {name},

We received a request to reset your password. Click the button below to create a new one.
email.resetExpiry: This link expires in 24 hours. If you didn't request this, you can safely ignore this email.

fallback.variation1: Together with their families, {couple1} and {couple2} invite you to celebrate their wedding on {date} at {venue}.
fallback.variation2: {couple1} and {couple2} request the pleasure of your company at their wedding celebration on {date} at {venue}.
fallback.variation3: Join us for a celebration of love as {couple1} and {couple2} unite in marriage on {date} at {venue}.

success.verifyingDescription: Please wait while we confirm your payment.
success.invitationLive: Your invitation is now live. Share it with your guests!
success.paymentStillProcessing: Payment is still processing. Please check back shortly.
success.paymentVerificationFailed: Could not verify payment. Please check your event dashboard.

errors.failedToStartPayment: Failed to start payment. Stripe may not be configured.
errors.verificationFailed: Verification failed. The link may have expired.

templatePreview.wordingPlaceholder: Your invitation wording will appear here.
